title: Joppack
body:
Do you like playing Vanilla but wish it had some quality of life improvements?
This is the modpack for you

 

The Joppack Takes the Vanilla experience and elevates it to be something greater!

In this modpack you will find that it doesnt inhibit you from playing on Vanilla servers as most mods are client side!

 

Mods of note!

Better Advancements
Better Than Mending
Better Third Person
Better F3
Borderless Mining
Cat Jam
Cave Dust
Chat Heads
Easier Villager Trading
Falling Leaves
Lootr
Mouse Tweaks
Nicer Skies
Paper Doll
Pettable
Randombar
Reacharound
Seamless Loading Screen
Shulker box Tool Tips
Silk Spawners
Vein Mining (Doesnt Work on vanilla servers)
